error_signature: This token belongs to a different object type.
title: Xano authentication token mismatch
symptom: The authentication token is received but results in an unauthorized error when used. The error message indicates that the token belongs to a different object type.
applies_when: Token is received but not set correctly
not_this_if: Token is correctly set and matches the expected object type
root_cause: This error occurs when the authentication token generated by Xano does not match the expected object type in the WeWeb application. This can happen if the token is associated with a different user role or object configuration than what is currently being accessed.
fix_steps: Check the user role and object type associated with the token in Xano.
Ensure that the token is correctly set in the WeWeb plugin settings.
If necessary, regenerate the token with the correct object type.
agent_instruction: Verify and set the correct user role and object type for the Xano authentication token.
